title: Polygon Aggregate Bar
description: An OHLC aggregate bar returned by Polygon REST aggregate endpoints. Returned in compact single-letter keys.

T.description: Ticker symbol (only present on certain endpoints, e.g. grouped daily).

v.description: Trading volume during the aggregate window.

t.description: Unix millisecond timestamp for the start of the aggregate window.

n.description: Number of transactions in the window.
